name: Chicken Etouffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large skillet with Pam cooking spray; place over medium heat until hot.
2. Add onion and other vegetables, sauté until tender.
3. Remove the vegetables from the skillet and set aside.
4. In the same skillet, add margarine and flour. Cook over low heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly, until the mixture is the color of a copper penny.
5. Return the vegetables to the skillet. Add chicken and other ingredients except rice and parsley.
6. Simmer 2 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
7. Serve over hot cooked rice.
8. Sprinkle with parsley.
